svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="测试循环" id="loop"> <mxGraphModel dx="-535" dy="-171" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="780" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="1 · 业务逻辑分析
读 PRD / 代码 / 数据" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="280" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="2 · 端点冒烟测试
curl 验证路由可达" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="280" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="3 · UI 点到点
真实点击,断言三件事" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="280" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="4 · 跨系统数据追踪
DOM + API + DB + 日志并行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="280" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.flowchart.document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="5 · 沉淀 Playwright 脚本
跑通即固化,持续复用" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="220" x="290" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d1" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=classic;" target="s2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d2" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=classic;" target="s3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d3" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=classic;" target="s4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d4" edge="1" parent="1" source="s4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;endArrow=classic;" target="s5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d5" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#dc2626;endArrow=classic;dashed=1;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="s1" value="失败 · 读日志追根因
给建议,等确认再改"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="断言三件事

① UI 反馈

② 数据持久化

③ 可逆性
 能取消 / 编辑 / 删除" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="180" x="580" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nl" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;endArrow=none;dashed=1;" target="note"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 30px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

③ 可逆性
